title: Real Madrid's £130m Alvarez bid rejected
summary: Real Madrid has offered €150m (£130m) for Atletico Madrid striker Julian Alvarez, but the defending champions have rejected the bid. The move reflects fierce competition between Madrid's two major clubs for elite talent.
content: Real Madrid make an offer of 150m euros (£130m) for striker Julian Alvarez, but city rivals Atletico Madrid turn it down.

zh.title: 皇马1.3亿英镑引援阿尔瓦雷斯遭拒
zh.summary: 皇马为马竞前锋朱利安·阿尔瓦雷斯出价1.5亿欧元（1.3亿英镑），但卫冕冠军拒绝了这一报价。该举措反映了马德里两支豪门争夺顶级球员的激烈竞争。

title: Does referee case show Fifa has lost control of its own World Cup?
summary: FIFA referee Omar Artan was denied entry to the United States for the World Cup despite holding proper documentation, raising concerns about FIFA's authority over its own tournament. The incident compounds worries about staff and supporters being turned away.
content: With referee Omar Artan denied entry to the United States and worries over staff and supporters being turned back, what does this tell us about the World Cup?

zh.title: 裁判事件是否说明国际足联对世界杯的控制力已失效？
zh.summary: 国际足联裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦尽管持有有效证件，仍被拒绝进入美国参加世界杯，这引发了人们对国际足联对自办赛事权威性的质疑。该事件加剧了人们对工作人员和球迷被拒绝入场的担忧。

title: Sullivan banned from contact with West Ham women's and youth teams since 2023
summary: West Ham co-chair David Sullivan has been banned from contact with the club's women's and youth teams following a safeguarding investigation. The ban has been in place since 2023.
content: The decision followed a safeguarding investigation opened by the the Football Association.

zh.summary: 西汉姆副主席大卫·沙利文因保护调查被禁止与俱乐部女队和青年队接触。该禁令自2023年以来一直有效。

title: 'Rashford's a dead cert' – Rooney, Walcott & Defoe on England's wide options
summary: Former England internationals Wayne Rooney, Theo Walcott, and Jermain Defoe assess the country's World Cup wide-position options, with strong consensus that Marcus Rashford is a certainty. The analysis reflects expert confidence in England's attacking depth.
content: Wayne Rooney, Theo Walcott, Jermain Defoe, Kae Kurd and Kelly Somers assess England's wide options for the World Cup.

title: Meet the England fan who collected beer from every World Cup nation
summary: BBC Sport profiles Gus Hully, an England fan who has compiled a unique collection of beers from all 48 nations at the World Cup. The collection represents an unusual way for a fan to celebrate the global tournament.
content: BBC Sport meets England fan Gus Hully who has collected one beer from each of the 48 nations competing at the World Cup.

zh.title: 认识这位收集了世界杯所有国家啤酒的英格兰球迷
zh.summary: BBC体育报道了英格兰球迷高斯·哈利的故事，他收集了世界杯全部48个国家的啤酒。这个收集代表了球迷庆祝全球赛事的独特方式。

title: Scotland's Kelly extends 'special' Rangers stay
summary: Scotland goalkeeper Liam Kelly has signed a two-year contract extension with Rangers ahead of the World Cup. The deal underscores Kelly's value to both his club and national team.

title: 'Gridlock alert days' and a race for tickets as US prepares to host World Cup
summary: The United States faces significant logistical challenges as it prepares to co-host the World Cup, widely viewed as the biggest global sporting event. Officials have warned of gridlock periods and high demand for tickets across the tournament.
content: Is the US ready to handle the pressure of co-hosting what many see as the biggest global sporting event?

title: Wolves re-sign striker Jimenez from Fulham

title: Player given five-year ban for elbow assault
summary: Thomas Taylor has received a five-year ban for attacking opponent Daniel Brookwell with an elbow during a fifth-tier Welsh league match in January. The severe sanction reflects the serious nature of the violent conduct.
content: Thomas Taylor attacked Daniel Brookwell during a fifth-tier Welsh league match between Porthmadog FC and Trearddur Bay on 17 January.

title: Football Daily
summary: BBC Sport's Football Daily program features Mark Chapman reflecting on legendary moments from Mexico 1986, including Diego Maradona's controversial "Hand of God" goal and his celebrated "Goal of the Century" in the same match. The retrospective explores how those moments shaped World Cup history.

title: Risk of death to oldest man at World Cup - walking miracle Gordon
summary: Craig Gordon, at 43 years old, has achieved an unlikely World Cup appearance for Scotland following a career defined by remarkable comebacks. His inclusion in the squad represents an improbable success story in professional football.

zh.title: 世界杯最年长球员面临死亡风险——行走的奇迹戈登

title: Ngumoha to leave England squad having made mark
summary: Young talent Rio Ngumoha will depart the US this week after impressing with England's World Cup squad, with plans to rejoin the country for Liverpool's pre-season tour next month. The player's exposure to the international setup provides valuable development experience.

title: I have right papers and visa - barred referee Artan

title: Crespo on Messi, returning to England and life as a manager
summary: Hernan Crespo discusses his coaching philosophy, emphasizing goals, passion, and intensity as defining characteristics from his playing career that now guide his managerial approach. The article explores his perspective on returning to England and his development as a coach.
